title: chrysanthemum gossypinum
intro: Chrysanthemum gossypinum is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is also known as Chinese chrysanthemum or autumn chrysanthemum. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum gossypinum include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and promoting relaxation and better sleep. Chrysanthemum gossypinum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
